summary:
Training completed in 5.3 hours (18 epochs).
Best performance achieved at epoch 18.

Key Metrics:
- mAP@50: 0.7318 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
- mAP@50-95: 0.3646 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
- Precision: 0.7629 (accuracy of positive predictions)
- Recall: 0.6667 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 1.6635
strengths: ✅ High precision: 0.7629 - low false positive rate
recommendations: 📈 Increase training epochs for better convergence
📊 Ensure dataset quality - check for mislabeled images
